"CMakeFiles/cad-engine.dir/src/ui/widgets/ViewCube.cpp.o" -o cad-engine  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib: /usr/local/lib/libTKBin.so.7.9.3 /usr/local/lib/libTKBinL.so.7.9.3 /usr/local/lib/libTKCAF.so.7.9.3
